business.name: GVK Handyman
business.tagline: The fix you need, when you need it

hero.headline: *One call* handles it all
hero.subheadline: From furniture assembly to TV mounts — we show up on time and clean up after ourselves.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every project, handled right
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to complete installations

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.description: Beds, desks, shelving — we make sense of those instruction manuals so you don't have to.

services.title: TV & Electronics Mounting
services.description: Wall-mounted TVs, sound systems, and cable management that looks clean and stays secure.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Drywall patches, door adjustments, cabinet fixes, and all the small stuff that adds up.

services.title: Basement Finishing
services.description: Turn that empty space into something useful — flooring, walls, lighting, and trim work.

services.title: General Maintenance
services.description: Seasonal upkeep, minor plumbing fixes, basic electrical work, and preventive repairs.

about.heading: Built for Atlanta homes
about.body: We're the Atlanta handyman team that shows up when we say we will. Real quotes before we start, clean work areas when we're done.

reviews.name: Mia B.
reviews.text: Mykola did an amazing job assembling my furniture! Quick and efficient with fair pricing.

reviews.name: Beverly A.
reviews.text: Very detail-oriented with accurate quotes upfront. Shows up on time and cleans up after. Great work.

reviews.name: Alisha G.
reviews.text: Professional and thorough. Helped with many home upgrades and our basement remodel. Would definitely recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Atlanta & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local handyman service throughout metro Atlanta

cta.heading: Ready to check it off your list?
cta.body: Get an accurate quote before we start. No surprises, no hidden fees.
